name: Staff of the Python
description: As a Magic action, you can throw this staff so that it lands in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of you, causing the staff to become a Giant Constrictor Snake in that space.

snake_control.command_requirement: Mental command (no action) if you're not Incapacitated
command_options: Issue general command (attack enemies, guard location)

reversion.recharge: Can't use property again for 1 hour
reversion.snake_destruction: Dies and reverts to staff if reduced to 0 HP, staff shatters and destroyed
reversion.early_reversion: Snake regains all HP if reverts before losing all HP
